privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Tor network rather than synthetic data. The expected onion address duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion has been verified as the legitimate official DuckDuckGo v3 onion service URL via public web sources. All required output file paths (report text, sockets HTML source, and telemetry screenshot) are accurately listed in the metadata and precisely mirror the explicit expectations in both the task instructions and verifier scripts.
